name: Indoor Golf Launch
about: Indoor Golf Launch specializes in custom indoor golf simulator solutions for both residential and commercial clients. They provide a comprehensive, A-Z process from consultation to installation, ensuring a seamless experience for creating personalized golf spaces. The company has delivered over 200 custom indoor golf rooms, focusing on bespoke designs, quality, and immersive technology tailored to individual preferences and spaces.
why_golfers_like_it: Custom-tailored simulator solutions designed to fit any space
Full A-Z process ensuring quality and seamless installation
Integration of leading launch monitors and advanced technology
Ongoing support and training after installation
Flexible pricing to accommodate various budgets and needs

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to provide your own golf clubs for use with the simulator.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not specify BYOB policies. It's best to contact the venue directly for details on outside food and drink.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required for 18 holes. This may vary depending on the simulator software and user preferences.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly mention kid-friendly features or policies. Contact the venue for more information on child suitability.
